message:
The other day, my pup, Charlie, decided that the mailman was the ultimate enemy. I mean, who knew a guy with a package could cause such a ruckus? As I watched him sprint to the door, barking his head off, I couldn’t help but chuckle at his over-the-top reaction. I had always joked that he was my little guard dog, but in that moment, I realized how important it is to keep our furry friends calm in unexpected situations.

After a little calm-down time and a treat (or two), I remembered the importance of having a pet emergency plan in place. It’s those little routines that can make a big difference when life throws us a curveball—like an overly energetic dog.

Have you ever had a funny “I told you so” moment with your pets? Share your stories!
